summary.business_type: Personal brand / freelance software-engineering portfolio (with blog)
top_findings: CRITICAL: Canonical/OG/sitemap/robots all point to sharafatali.dev, not the live vercel.app domain
CRITICAL: og:image URL is unreachable (wrong domain) — social previews show no image
HIGH: sitemap.xml and robots.txt advertise 13 URLs on a non-resolving domain
HIGH: Animated stats render as 0 in the SSR HTML instead of 2+/5/15+/6+
MEDIUM: Testimonials are anonymized, weakening E-E-A-T trust signals
quick_wins: Drive site URL from NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL env var (fixes canonical/OG/sitemap/robots at once)
Render real stat values as the counter base so SSR HTML shows them
Add WebSite, BreadcrumbList, and ProfilePage JSON-LD
Set real liveUrl values on case studies

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: HTTPS + HSTS (max-age 2y, includeSubDomains, preload)
All security headers present (nosniff, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)
Static prerendering + Vercel CDN cache HIT
Clean URLs, correct robots meta (index,follow), /api disallowed, no noindex
Content fully server-rendered (not client-only SPA); all routes 200; custom 404 returns 404

findings.title: Site URL mismatch across canonical / OG / sitemap / robots
findings.description: metadataBase = siteConfig.url = https://sharafatali.dev, but the live site is portfolio-plum-theta-20.vercel.app. Every canonical, og:url, sitemap <loc>, and robots Host/Sitemap points to the wrong (non-resolving) domain, risking non-indexation of the live pages.
findings.recommendation: Set url: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL ?? '<live domain>' in src/lib/site.ts and configure NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL in Vercel to the final canonical domain (ideally a connected custom domain).

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Strong first-person Experience signals in case studies
Expertise demonstrated with code and trade-offs in blog
~2,000 words server-rendered on homepage; rich case-study pages
Clear authorship tied to a Person entity

findings.title: Animated stats render as 0 in HTML
findings.description: Counters start at 0 and reach real values only after client JS. Crawlers/no-JS see '0+ Years building'.
findings.recommendation: Use the true value as the counter base and animate the displayed number, not the data.

findings.title: Anonymized testimonials
findings.description: 'Project Lead', 'Founder' read as placeholder and weaken trust/E-E-A-T.
findings.recommendation: Use real names, roles, and photos/LinkedIn links, or hide the section until available.

findings.title: Thin blog posts
findings.description: Posts are ~2 min / ~500-700 words — well-written but light for competitive ranking.
findings.recommendation: Expand the top 2-3 target posts to 1,000-1,500 words.

findings.title: No about/author page
findings.description: No dedicated entity page to anchor E-E-A-T.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Unique descriptive titles with clean template
Meta descriptions on every page
One H1 per page with logical H2/H3 hierarchy
Strong internal linking (nav, footer, related posts)
Natural keyword alignment

findings.title: Homepage title is brand-only
findings.description: Great for branded search; could test a keyword/value variant.
findings.recommendation: A/B a title with target keywords once query data exists.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Valid Person schema sitewide
Valid BlogPosting on each article

findings.title: Missing WebSite, BreadcrumbList, ProfilePage/Organization, CreativeWork
findings.description: Base schema is good but misses rich-result and entity opportunities.
findings.recommendation: Add WebSite + BreadcrumbList (detail pages) + ProfilePage wrapping Person; optionally CreativeWork per case study.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: Static prerender + CDN cache HIT (fast TTFB)
Zero content images (no image LCP/CLS, nothing to lazy-load)
Self-hosted next/font with display:swap
Lean JS (~170KB first load), reserved space keeps CLS low
Motion gated behind prefers-reduced-motion and pointer:fine

findings.title: No field (CrUX) or lab Lighthouse data captured
findings.description: New domain, no real-user data yet; no Lighthouse run in this environment.
findings.recommendation: Run PageSpeed Insights on the live URL; re-check CrUX in GSC ~28 days after traffic.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: Citable structure (clear headings, definitions, numbered takeaways)
Structured data gives AI engines clean entities
Content present in static HTML for non-JS AI crawlers

findings.title: No llms.txt
findings.recommendation: Add /public/llms.txt summarizing identity, services, key URLs.

findings.title: New domain, no authority/mentions
findings.description: AI visibility tracks cross-web brand mentions.
findings.recommendation: Build citations: GitHub README, LinkedIn, dev.to, directories.

categories.name: Images
what_works: No tags = no alt/size/format/lazy-load debt
Dynamic 1200x630 OG image via next/og

findings.title: OG image URL unreachable (wrong domain)
findings.description: og:image stamped with sharafatali.dev; previews break.
findings.recommendation: Fixed by the site-URL change; verify with LinkedIn/X validators.

findings.title: Decorative-only visuals limit image search
findings.description: No real screenshots to surface in Google Images.
findings.recommendation: Optionally add 1-2 captioned screenshots per case study with alt text.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Reconcile site domain via NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL (fixes canonical/OG/og-image/sitemap/robots)
Render real stat values in the SSR HTML

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Replace anonymized testimonials with real attribution
Set real liveUrl values on case studies
Submit sitemap + verify in Google Search Console (and Bing)

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Expand top 2-3 blog posts to 1,000-1,500 words
Build citation signals (GitHub, LinkedIn, dev.to, directories)
Add real screenshots per case study with alt text

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Re-check CWV field data ~4 weeks after traffic
Track GSC impressions/clicks; tune low-CTR titles
Re-run audit after Phase 1-2; set an seo-drift baseline
